zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Stourton於大約1130年出生在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓時，他的父親Botolph de Stourton57歲，母親Ann Godwin56歲。他和Agnes de Stafford至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1185年在英國享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Stourton was born about 1130, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Botolph de Stourton, was 57 and his mother, Ann Godwin, was 56. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Agnes de Stafford. He died about 1185, in England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Stourton est né environ 1130, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Botolph de Stourton, avait 57 ans et sa mère, Ann Godwin, avait 56 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Agnes de Stafford. Il est décédé environ 1185, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Stourton um 1130 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Botolph de Stourton 57 und seine Mutter Ann Godwin 56. Er hatte mit Agnes de Stafford mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1185 im Alter von 57 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Stourton è nato il circa 1130 nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Botolph de Stourton, aveva 57 anni e il suo madre, Ann Godwin, aveva 56 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Agnes de Stafford. Morì circa 1185, nel England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William de Stourtonが約1130年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンで生まれた時，父Botolph de Stourtonは57歳，母Ann Godwinは56歳であった。彼はAgnes de Staffordとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1185年にイギリスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Stourton(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Botolph de Stourton(은)는 57세였고, 그의 어머니 Ann Godwin(은)는 56세였다. 그는 Agnes de Stafford(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1185년 영국에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1130, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Botolph de Stourton, tinha 57 anos e sua mãe, Ann Godwin, tinha 56 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Agnes de Stafford. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1185, em Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Stourton родился около 1130 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Botolph de Stourton было 57 лет, а матери, которую звали Ann Godwin, 56. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Agnes de Stafford. Он умер около 1185 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Agnes de Stafford. Murió aproximadamente 1185, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
